calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Striking Costs;
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CLAUDIA MOLINA'S Motion For Order Striking Costs IS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. PROOF OF SERVICE DOES NOT LIST DATE OF SERVICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR# 7077 =301/HEK

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Thomas Drohan, Esq. & Larry Becker, Esq. of Legal Assistance for The Elderly, 415-538-3333 for defendant and moving party Claudia Molina
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq., 415-409-7611 for plaintiff and opposing party Pepito Alvaro

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT CLAUDIA MOLINA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIF HAS ESTABLISHED PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #: 8620 (301/PHA/AL)
